TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cory Blackwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1963, byacing te 3 ru 27 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Illinois, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 196 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 95 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1984 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Seattle SuperSonics. qnxan nya Blackwell htagan beh sa Chicago. hiya yaya(Wazirah) mlahang nya. hiya ga mqwas beh Crane pqwasan biru. suruw lga tmwang Wisconsin krahu' pqwasan biru. raral ga,Blackwell mzyu mari cyux pqwasan biru.suruw lga tmwang NBA. Blackwell mtzyaw beh NBA. suruw lga maki Chicago. 1990 kawas Blackwell ru bes nya tmwang kyokay maki Chicago. 1991 kawas Kip McKean psina Blackwell musa maki LA. 1994 kawas Cory Blackwell yaya Wazirah lalu nya,gluw na muslim . 2000 kawas hiya ru Megan ini mtzyaw la.suruw lga wal mt'alax la. 2010 kawas Cory Blackwell tmwang(ICC). hiya misu maki cyalifuniya ,losanci .'bagan lga,hiya ru bes nya Jeraldine musa Chicago,mlahang Chicago ICC. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨorj βlaʦ~ʨkwell s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa illinois~ɕ, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu s~ɕeattle s~ɕupers~ɕoniʦ~ʨs~ɕ. qnxan nja βlaʦ~ʨkwell ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo. ħija jaja(waziraħ) mlaħaŋ nja. ħija ɣa mqwas~ɕ βeħ ʦ~ʨrane pqwas~ɕan βiru. s~ɕuruw lɣa tmwaŋ wis~ɕʦ~ʨons~ɕin kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. raral ɣa,βlaʦ~ʨkwell mzju mari ʦ~ʨjux pqwas~ɕan βiru.s~ɕuruw lɣa tmwaŋ nβa. βlaʦ~ʨkwell mtzjaw βeħ nβa. s~ɕuruw lɣa maki ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo. **** kawas~ɕ βlaʦ~ʨkwell ru βes~ɕ nja tmwaŋ kjokaj maki ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo. **** kawas~ɕ kip mʦ~ʨkean ps~ɕina βlaʦ~ʨkwell mus~ɕa maki la. **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨorj βlaʦ~ʨkwell jaja waziraħ lalu nja,ɣluw na mus~ɕlim . **** kawas~ɕ ħija ru meɣan ini mtzjaw la.s~ɕuruw lɣa wal mtʔalax la. **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨorj βlaʦ~ʨkwell tmwaŋ(iʦ~ʨʦ~ʨ). ħija mis~ɕu maki ʦ~ʨjali*unija ,los~ɕanʦ~ʨi .ʔβaɣan lɣa,ħija ru βes~ɕ nja *eral*ine mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo,mlaħaŋ ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo iʦ~ʨʦ~ʨ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Cory Blackwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1963, byacing te 3 ru 27 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Illinois, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 196 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 95 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1984 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Seattle SuperSonics. qnxan nya Blackwell htagan beh sa Chicago. hiya yaya(Wazirah) mlahang nya. hiya ga mqwas beh Crane pqwasan biru. suruw lga tmwang Wisconsin krahu' pqwasan biru. raral ga,Blackwell mzyu mari cyux pqwasan biru.suruw lga tmwang NBA. Blackwell mtzyaw beh NBA. suruw lga maki Chicago. 1990 kawas Blackwell ru bes nya tmwang kyokay maki Chicago. 1991 kawas Kip McKean psina Blackwell musa maki LA. 1994 kawas Cory Blackwell yaya Wazirah lalu nya,gluw na muslim . 2000 kawas hiya ru Megan ini mtzyaw la.suruw lga wal mt'alax la. 2010 kawas Cory Blackwell tmwang(ICC). hiya misu maki cyalifuniya ,losanci .'bagan lga,hiya ru bes nya Jeraldine musa Chicago,mlahang Chicago ICC. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨorj βlaʦ~ʨkwell s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa illinois~ɕ, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu s~ɕeattle s~ɕupers~ɕoniʦ~ʨs~ɕ. qnxan nja βlaʦ~ʨkwell ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo. ħija jaja(waziraħ) mlaħaŋ nja. ħija ɣa mqwas~ɕ βeħ ʦ~ʨrane pqwas~ɕan βiru. s~ɕuruw lɣa tmwaŋ wis~ɕʦ~ʨons~ɕin kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. raral ɣa,βlaʦ~ʨkwell mzju mari ʦ~ʨjux pqwas~ɕan βiru.s~ɕuruw lɣa tmwaŋ nβa. βlaʦ~ʨkwell mtzjaw βeħ nβa. s~ɕuruw lɣa maki ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo. **** kawas~ɕ βlaʦ~ʨkwell ru βes~ɕ nja tmwaŋ kjokaj maki ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo. **** kawas~ɕ kip mʦ~ʨkean ps~ɕina βlaʦ~ʨkwell mus~ɕa maki la. **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨorj βlaʦ~ʨkwell jaja waziraħ lalu nja,ɣluw na mus~ɕlim . **** kawas~ɕ ħija ru meɣan ini mtzjaw la.s~ɕuruw lɣa wal mtʔalax la. **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨorj βlaʦ~ʨkwell tmwaŋ(iʦ~ʨʦ~ʨ). ħija mis~ɕu maki ʦ~ʨjali*unija ,los~ɕanʦ~ʨi .ʔβaɣan lɣa,ħija ru βes~ɕ nja *eral*ine mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo,mlaħaŋ ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo iʦ~ʨʦ~ʨ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
